tables.name: tools
tables.label: Suite tools
tables.description: One row per tool this suite offers. Home renders these as cards; the screen column names the screen the card opens, so the hub consolidates Sheets, Docs and Notes into one applet — adding a tool = adding a row + a screen.

tables.name: sheet_budget
tables.label: Budget sheet
tables.description: A spreadsheet: a free grid of rows and columns. Edit cells inline; add rows or new columns straight from the grid. One of the workbook's sheets.

tables.name: sheet_roster
tables.label: Roster sheet
tables.description: A second spreadsheet in the same workbook. The Sheets tab's table switcher flips between this and the Budget sheet.

tables.name: pages
tables.label: Pages
tables.description: A self-nesting tree of document pages. A page may have a parent page, so pages form tabs, sub-tabs and sub-sub-tabs to any depth. Each page is a full rich-text document and can carry attachments.

tables.name: notes
tables.label: Notes
tables.description: Free-form notes. Each note has a title, a body, an optional date and a pinned flag. Pinned notes stay on top.
